[ 01 / About ]

A few words about me.

Introduction

I'm a final-year Computer Science student at UMT Lahore, graduating mid-2026.

I build end-to-end products — React frontends, FastAPI and Django backends, deep learning models, deployed on AWS with Terraform-managed infrastructure.

My favorite work sits at the intersection of UX and hard engineering — like training a YOLOv11 model to detect brain tumors at 98.4% accuracy, then wrapping it in an interface a clinician would actually use.

[ 02 / Work ]

Selected projects.

★ 01 / Featured

MED Vision AI

AI-powered brain tumor detection from MRI scans.

A clinical decision support platform that processes MRI scans through a fine-tuned YOLOv11s-seg model to detect and segment gliomas, meningiomas, and pituitary tumors in real time — under 1.5 seconds.

An integrated MobileNetV3 guardrail rejects non-MRI inputs, a DistilBERT-powered chatbot handles medical queries, and clinicians can generate timestamped PDF diagnostic reports straight from the inference output.

02 / Frontend

Spotify Clone

A pixel-faithful music streaming UI.

A fully responsive Spotify clone replicating the playlist browser, featured charts, and interactive music player UI — built from scratch in React with custom reusable components and careful attention to Spotify's actual design language.

The focus here was UI fidelity and responsive behavior: matching the original's micro-interactions, hover states, and layout transitions across breakpoints without leaning on a component library.

100%
Responsive
20+
Components
React.js Tailwind CSS JavaScript

github.com/waqar-030/spotify-clone
03 / Full-Stack

CHANGO HR

A full-stack HR management platform for employees, attendance & payroll.

A full-stack HRMS that streamlines employee management, payroll workflows, and organizational data handling. Built on the MERN stack with JWT-based authentication and role-based access control.

Designed with a focus on secure session handling, scalable data models, and a clean operator-facing dashboard for HR teams to actually want to use.

MongoDB Express React Node.js JWT
